# Knowledge graph

The QAtlas vault as a force-directed network — **models** realize **universality
classes**, classes **predict** quantities, **bounds** constrain quantities, and
models **delegate** quantities to their class.  Orange dashed = a coherence
*gap* (an undeveloped class, or a delegation whose model realizes no class).
Drag nodes; hover for type.

*Generated by `docs/atlas/graph_export.jl` from the live registry —
51 nodes (16 models, 7 classes,
3 bound domains, 25 quantities), 81 edges.*

```@raw html
<div id="qatlas-graph" style="height:720px;border:1px solid var(--light-color,#ddd);border-radius:6px;"></div>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/vis-network@9.1.6/standalone/umd/vis-network.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  if (typeof vis === "undefined") return;
  var nodes = new vis.DataSet([
      {id:"Q:BekensteinBound",label:"BekensteinBound",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: BekensteinBound"},
      {id:"Q:LogarithmicNegativity",label:"LogarithmicNegativity",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: LogarithmicNegativity"},
      {id:"Q:VonNeumannEntropy{:equilibrium}",label:"VonNeumannEntropy{:equilibrium}",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: VonNeumannEntropy{:equilibrium}"},
      {id:"M:LongRangeIsing1D",label:"LongRangeIsing1D",group:"model",title:"model: LongRangeIsing1D"},
      {id:"C:MeanField",label:"MeanField",group:"class",title:"universality class: MeanField"},
      {id:"Q:MassGap",label:"MassGap",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: MassGap"},

      {id:"M:IsingTriangular",label:"IsingTriangular",group:"model",title:"model: IsingTriangular"},
      {id:"B:QuantumInformation",label:"QuantumInformation",group:"bound",title:"bound domain: QuantumInformation"},

      {id:"M:XXZ1D",label:"XXZ1D",group:"model",title:"model: XXZ1D"},
      {id:"Q:MutualInformation",label:"MutualInformation",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: MutualInformation"},
      {id:"M:MixedFieldIsing1D",label:"MixedFieldIsing1D",group:"model",title:"model: MixedFieldIsing1D"},
      {id:"C:KPZ",label:"KPZ",group:"class",title:"universality class: KPZ"},
      {id:"Q:LuttingerParameter",label:"LuttingerParameter",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: LuttingerParameter"},
      {id:"Q:CHSHBound",label:"CHSHBound",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: CHSHBound"},
      {id:"M:RandomBondIsing2D",label:"RandomBondIsing2D",group:"model",title:"model: RandomBondIsing2D"},
      {id:"Q:CardyEntropy",label:"CardyEntropy",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: CardyEntropy"},
      {id:"B:Dynamics",label:"Dynamics",group:"bound",title:"bound domain: Dynamics"},
      {id:"Q:CentralCharge",label:"CentralCharge",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: CentralCharge"},
      {id:"C:Potts4",label:"Potts4",group:"class",title:"universality class: Potts4"},
      {id:"Q:Energy{:per_site}",label:"Energy{:per_site}",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: Energy{:per_site}"},
      {id:"M:TASEP",label:"TASEP",group:"model",title:"model: TASEP"},
      {id:"C:Ising",label:"Ising",group:"class",title:"universality class: Ising"},
      {id:"C:Heisenberg",label:"Heisenberg",group:"class",title:"universality class: Heisenberg"},
      {id:"M:J1J2Heisenberg1D",label:"J1J2Heisenberg1D",group:"model",title:"model: J1J2Heisenberg1D"},
      {id:"Q:ChaosBound",label:"ChaosBound",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: ChaosBound"},
      {id:"M:IsingSquare",label:"IsingSquare",group:"model",title:"model: IsingSquare"},
      {id:"Q:OptimalCloningFidelity",label:"OptimalCloningFidelity",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: OptimalCloningFidelity"},
      {id:"Q:CriticalExponents",label:"CriticalExponents",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: CriticalExponents"},
      {id:"C:Potts3",label:"Potts3",group:"class",title:"universality class: Potts3"},
      {id:"Q:BB84KeyRate",label:"BB84KeyRate",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: BB84KeyRate"},
      {id:"M:ExtendedHubbard1D",label:"ExtendedHubbard1D",group:"model",title:"model: ExtendedHubbard1D"},
      {id:"Q:ScramblingTime",label:"ScramblingTime",group:"quantity",title:"quantity: ScramblingTime"}
  ]);
  var edges = new vis.DataSet([
      {from:"M:TFIM",to:"C:Ising",label:"realizes",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},
      {from:"M:XXZ1D",to:"C:XY",label:"realizes",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},
      {from:"M:Heisenberg1D",to:"C:Heisenberg",label:"realizes",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},

      {from:"M:CurieWeissIsing",to:"C:MeanField",label:"realizes",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},
      {from:"M:TASEP",to:"C:KPZ",label:"realizes",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},
      {from:"M:HaldaneShastry",to:"C:Heisenberg",label:"realizes",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},
      {from:"M:IsingTriangular",to:"C:Ising",label:"realizes",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},
      {from:"C:MeanField",to:"Q:CriticalExponents",label:"predicts",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},

      {from:"M:HaldaneShastry",to:"Q:VonNeumannEntropy{:equilibrium}",label:"delegates",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"}},

      {from:"M:HeisenbergXYZ",to:"Q:LuttingerParameter",label:"delegates",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"},color:{color:"#e8a33d"},dashes:true},
      {from:"M:LongRangeIsing1D",to:"Q:MassGap",label:"delegates",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"},color:{color:"#e8a33d"},dashes:true},
      {from:"M:DMIHeisenberg1D",to:"Q:Energy{:per_site}",label:"delegates",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"},color:{color:"#e8a33d"},dashes:true},
      {from:"M:J1J2Heisenberg1D",to:"Q:Energy{:per_site}",label:"delegates",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"},color:{color:"#e8a33d"},dashes:true},
      {from:"M:MixedFieldIsing1D",to:"Q:MassGap",label:"delegates",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"},color:{color:"#e8a33d"},dashes:true},
      {from:"M:ExtendedHubbard1D",to:"Q:ChargeGap",label:"delegates",arrows:"to",font:{size:9,color:"#888"},color:{color:"#e8a33d"},dashes:true}
  ]);
  var groups = {
    model:    {color:{background:"#4f8cc9",border:"#2b5d8a"},shape:"dot"},
    class:    {color:{background:"#9b6cc9",border:"#6b3f96"},shape:"diamond"},
    bound:    {color:{background:"#c95f5f",border:"#8a2b2b"},shape:"triangle"},
    quantity: {color:{background:"#5fae6f",border:"#2b7a3f"},shape:"box"},
    gap:      {color:{background:"#e8a33d",border:"#b87410"},shape:"diamond"}
  };
  var network = new vis.Network(
    document.getElementById("qatlas-graph"),
    {nodes:nodes, edges:edges},
    {
      groups: groups,
      nodes: {font:{size:12}},
      edges: {smooth:{type:"continuous"}},
      physics: {barnesHut:{gravitationalConstant:-8000,springLength:120,springConstant:0.04},
                stabilization:{iterations:200}},
      interaction: {hover:true, tooltipDelay:120}
    }
  );
})();
</script>
```
